sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15499" key="a)rrh/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρρήμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n15499.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without speech, silent,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:128" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.128</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
